text: We always use the Prescot one as we don’t live far, so this was my first time visiting the Widnes one. They were all very helpful and reasonably priced. Everyone seemed friendly and despite feeling worried about my car beforehand, as it had failed mot and needed a diagnostic test done, this garage was nearly half price compared to another and after the test they fixed what they needed to and explained everything to me. Thanks again.

Jon just carried out the following work
Fit a new AC compressor, change AT fluid and fix electrical handbrake. All done very quickly and professionally for a great price.
Highly recommended

These guys complete and utter legends everyone I dealt with was so helpful and without the advice and guidance I wouldn’t have been able to get the parts to fix my car!

Fitted me in a week early than expected and had the job done in a few hours! And the cars back to normal like nothing happened

Will be going back for all my future work and services

I am a returning customer and have brought my car in for several different jobs in the past year.  The owner Jon and his team are always friendly and approachable, and explain what needs doing before the work is carried out. I had a quote from a different garage for a job,  but Jon managed to do it for me at a much more reasonable price. I’ve always had my car back the same day too.  I’ve been very happy with all the work they’ve done so far. Highly recommended
